ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the vendor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the vendor */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the vendor's website */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vendor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "borough" TEXT /* Borough where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_types" (
  "payment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment type */,
  "payment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the payment type */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the payment type is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_codes" (
  "ratecode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate code */,
  "ratecode_name" TEXT /* Name of the rate code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the rate code */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate code became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate code expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratecode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the driver works for */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the driver */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the driver */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the driver was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the driver (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "total_rides" INTEGER /* Total number of rides completed by the driver */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating given to the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_drivers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ride_drivers" (
  "ride_driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ride-driver link */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ride_driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ride_drivers_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., driver, manager, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the ride */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the ride was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_breakdowns" (
  "fare_breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare component */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the fare component */,
  "component_amount" REAL /* Amount of the fare component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_breakdown_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the vehicle was manufactured */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor the vehicle belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cancellation_reasons" (
  "reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cancellation reason */,
  "reason_description" TEXT /* Description of the cancellation reason */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "ride_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ride for which the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feedback was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)
